title: SILVERHOOK DIESEL TREATMENT & INJECTOR CLEANER 325ml
description: From the manufacturer Silverhook Made In England Silverhook was established in 1994 and has gained a reputation throughout the automotive industry for providing quality products and an exceptional standard of service. Working in partnership with customers enables Silverhook to develop new, innovative products tailored to their specific requirements. Silverhook's products have made a tangible difference to customers nationwide and abroad, increasing their sales, margin, and efficiency of supply. Customers benefit from winning lines, fast delivery, friendly & professional service. At Silverhook, we take great pride in being one of the few remaining companies in our industry that have remained in the United Kingdom. Engine Oil Grease Sanitiser Antifreeze And more!
